parents.subject: LU-8994 lmv: honour the specified stripe index

commit.subject: LU-7115 fld: don't retry for no LWP device
commit.message:
LU-7115 fld: don't retry for no LWP device

Just try again for LWP import since other client
import may run into deadloop.

Signed-off-by: Yang Sheng <yang.sheng@intel.com>
